task: Create an agent skill called 'cc-bos' that implements the CC-BOS jailbreak attack framework from arXiv:2602.22983. The skill should: (1) clone/install the CC-BOS repo (github.com/xunhuang123/CC-BOS), (2) provide a clean SKILL.md interface for running black-box jailbreak attacks using classical Chinese prompt optimisation, (3) wrap the 8-dimension fruit fly optimisation pipeline (role/behavior/mechanism/metaphor/expression/knowledge/trigger/context), (4) include a defensive use mode — analyse a prompt to detect if it resembles a CC-BOS attack pattern. Skill goes in ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/cc-bos/. Push completed skill to github-alexchen:AlexChen31337/alexchen-workspace.git
